channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: DK Metcalf traded to Steelers, agrees to 5-year deal as Seahawks fulfill disgruntled star's wish: reports
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers have traded for D.K. Metcalf, and signed the Seattle Seahawks star receiver to a five-year, $150 million contract to keep him long-term, per multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl stars Josh Sweat and Milton Williams headline a list of NFL free agents
item.description: NFL teams can start reshaping their rosters by signing free agents this week. There’s plenty of attention on the quarterbacks, including Sam Darnold, Russell Wilson and Justin Fields.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ovechkin scores 886th career goal into an empty net to move 9 back of breaking Gretzky's NHL record
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin scored his 886th career goal into an empty net Sunday to move nine back of breaking Wayne Gretzky’s NHL record.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boys Rugby: Cathedral Catholic 28, La Costa Canyon 17
item.description:
The High School Boys Rugby Championship was held in Del Mar as the Cathedral Catholic Dons hosted the La Costa Canyon Mavericks.
It was the Dons who came out victorious, defeated La Costa Canyon by a score of 28-17, to win their 5th straight Rugby Championship.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Allende scores to lead Miami past Charlotte 1-0 with Messi again watching from the bench
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Tadeo Allende scored 17 seconds into the second half and Inter Miami won its third straight match without Lionel Messi, beating Charlotte FC 1-0 on Sunday. Messi has not played since a win over Sporting Kansas City on Feb.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: SF Giants option Ragsdale, Seymour in latest round of cuts
item.description: Manager Bob Melvin said both pitchers have "big stuff" that could land them in the majors down the road.
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Nearing the end of a short spring, Dodgers, Cubs make final preparations for season opener in Japan
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Shohei Ohtani's bat is ready for the Los Angeles Dodgers while Shota Imanaga has looked good on the mound for the Chicago Cubs with less than 10 days remaining before baseball's regular-season opener in Japan. The teams will play two games at the Tokyo Dome on March 18 and 19.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL great Eddie George offered Bowling Green job: report
item.description: Eddie George, a Heisman Trophy winner, has spent the past four years as the coach at Tennessee State. But there is reportedly an offer on the table for him to join Bowling Green.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes hire Alex Jensen as head basketball coach
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Alex Jensen is coming home to Utah. Jensen was hired as the University of Utah's 17th head basketball coach Thursdaay, replacing Craig Smith, who was fired last month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde,Bjorkstrand as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Men charged in deaths of 3 Chiefs fans found dead in backyard
item.description: Ricky Johnson, 38; Clayton McGeeney, 36; and David Harrington, 37, were all found dead in their friend’s Kansas City backyard on January 9, 2024.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: Green Day's Billie Joe Armstrong, rapper Too Short join Oakland Ballers' ownership group
item.description: (KRON) -- East Bay rap icon Too Short and Green Day frontman Billie Joe Armstrong are getting behind the Oakland Ballers. The team announced on Wednesday that the two internationally renowned musicians -- both of whom have East Bay roots -- will be joining the team's ownership group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Flo Rida set to perform postgame concert at Rate Field this summer
item.description: Flo Rida will perform at a postgame concert at Rate Field following the White Sox game versus the San Francisco Giants on Friday, June 27 at 6:40 p.m. CT, with on-field Postgame Concert passes available to single-game ticket purchasers and White Sox season ticket holders.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being face of NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: Bears to send 6th-round draft pick to Rams for veteran OL Jonah Jackson
item.description: Offensive line is generally considered the Bears' biggest position of need this offseason. They're reportedly addressing that before free agency even begins by agreeing to trade for a player familiar with new head coach Ben Johnson.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
